title: Plain Writing at the Department of State
description: What is the Plain Writing Act? The Plain Writing Act  How is the Department implementing the Plain Writing Act? text:
What is the Plain Writing Act?
The Plain Writing Act
How is the Department implementing the Plain Writing Act?
We offer a several one hour workshops for employees including:
The principles of plain writing
Plan writing for local staff at overseas posts; and
Brevity and clarity
We offer targeted plain writing training to offices and teams within the Department.
We regularly publish notices reminding employees to use plain writing in their communication.
For additional details on how the Department is implementing the Plain Writing Act see the annual compliance reports.
2025 Plain Writing Act Compliance Report [369 KB]
2024 Plain Writing Act Compliance Report [44 MB]
2023 Plain Writing Act Compliance Report [2 MB]
2022 Plain Writing Act Compliance Report [190 KB]
2021 Plain Writing Act Compliance Report [154 KB]
Federal Report Card
Plain Writing Tips
The Office of Organizational Policy administers Plain Writing Program initiatives of the Department of State. Please email PlainLanguage@state.gov with any comments.
